market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Eric Trump says bitcoin in its 'greatest period ever' as Wall Street falls in line
articles.description: Speaking at Bitcoin Las Vegas 2026, the American Bitcoin co-founder declared the last six months a turning point.

articles.title: Fed chair Jerome Powell says he will stay on as Govenor after term amid legal pressure
articles.description: During a press conference following the Fed's interest rate decision, Powell said ongoing scrutiny and political tension forced him to stay, despite his plans to step down.

articles.title: Tech giant Meta starts paying some creators in stablecoin with Stripe's support
articles.description: The tech giant is first offering the feature to select creators in Colombia and the Philippines.

articles.title: Kustodia launches smart contract escrow for LATAM's $600m fraud crisis
articles.description: Mexico's first peso-denominated blockchain escrow goes live on SPEI for high-value P2P transactions.

articles.title: Bitcoin falls as traders cut risk ahead of FOMC: Will TradFi, spot ETF volumes bolster $70K support?
articles.description: Bitcoin price volatility tends to spike before and after the FOMC, a pattern that is playing out this week. Will institutional investor BTC buying protect the $70,000 support?

articles.title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
articles.description: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

articles.title: KuCoin EU hires new AML chief after Austria ban on new business under MiCA
articles.description: KuCoin EU hires a new AML chief and deputies in Vienna weeks after Austria’s regulator banned the MiCA‑licensed exchange from taking on new business over compliance gaps.

articles.title: JPMorgan’s new blockchain chief once warned that tokenization does not equal liquidity
articles.description: JPMorgan’s new crypto head Oliver Harris warns that tokenizing assets isn't a magic fix for liquidity, but believes the technology is finally ready to "rip out" and replace the financial industry's legacy back end.

articles.title: The ‘tokenization of everything’ is no longer a theory
articles.description: Wall Street is moving in. Washington has changed sides. And Consensus 2026 is where crypto’s biggest inflection point gets decided.

articles.title: U.S. senator holding cards on Clarity Act's next move says it's ready to get to hearing
articles.description: Senator Thom Tillis was at the center of the legislative negotiations over stablecoin yield that have delayed the market structure bill, but he said it's time to go.

articles.title: Realmint launches to give retail investors a smarter way into RWAs
articles.description: Realmint officially launches today, opening doors for retail investors to access RWAs through a smarter, data-driven platform.

articles.title: Fed leaves rates unchanged at Jerome Powell's final meeting as chairman
articles.description: The U.S. Federal Reserve's next meeting in June is likely to be led by Kevin Warsh after he cleared a Senate Banking Committee vote on Wednesday.

articles.title: Most crypto investors believe Bitcoin is undervalued: Coinbase survey
articles.description: Coinbase survey results and onchain data suggest that Bitcoin is undervalued and at the tail end of its bear market phase.

articles.title: U.K.'s Farage faces standards probe over $6.7 million gift from Tether billionaire Christopher Harborne
articles.description: The Conservative and Labour parties argued Nigel Farage broke Commons rules by not declaring the £5 million, but Reform UK said it was an exempt, personal, unconditional gift.

articles.title: Visa adds Polygon, Base support as stablecoin settlement run rate hits $7B
articles.description: Visa broadens its crypto pilot to nine blockchains as stablecoin volumes grow, highlighting early traction for onchain settlement in global payments.

articles.title: Changelly turns 11, reaches 12 million users, and expands global partner network
articles.description: Changelly, a leading instant cryptocurrency exchange and trusted blockchain API provider, is marking its 11th anniversary with a new company milestone.

articles.title: Robinhood, Coinbase lead crypto stock rout as Trump rejects Iran plan
articles.description: President Trump reportedly rejected Iran's offer to end the U.S. blockade and open the Strait of Hormuz, sending crude oil prices surging 6%.

articles.title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
articles.description: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

articles.title: More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
articles.description: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.

articles.title: Bill Gurley, Jack Altman back startup Pursuit, which helps companies sell to government
articles.description: On Wednesday, Pursuit announced a $22 million Series A round led by Mike Rosengarten, the co-founder of OpenGov, with big-name VCs participating.
